verses.text: “Na gen uh thu khempeuh ka muhsa vive hi a, ka bilin ka zakzaksa, ka theihtheihsa thu ahi hi
Note' theih khempeuh, kei zong ka thei hi. Note khempeuh sangin ka neuzaw tuan het kei hi
Ahi zongin note tawh kam a kinial hiloin, Pasian tawh a kinial ka hi hi. Pasian tawh hih ka thu ka kinial nuam hi
Note in na haina uh zuauthu tawh na melh uh a, kuamah a damsak zolo zato siam-a kinei mite tawh na kibang uh hi
Pau hetloin om hi le uh cin, mipil mah hong kisazaw ding hi
“Tu-in ka thugen hong ngai un la, ka gen laitakin limtak ngai un
Pasian' min dingin thumanlo genin, ama-a' dingin zuauthu gensak ding na hi uh hiam
Pasian angvan ding a, ama-a' ding gensak ding na hi uh hiam
Pasian in limtakin note hong entel leh note' sungah hoihna mu ding ahi hiam? Mihingte na khem bangun Pasian a khem thei dingin kingaihsun na hi uh hiam
A simthamin angvanna na zat uh leh amah in note hong taii taktak ding hi
Ama vangliatna in note hong lausak ding a, note tungah amah kihtakna hong tung ding hilo ahi hiam
Na thugente uh vutkhu bang hi lel a, na siksante uh leivui bang hi lel hi
Pau kei un la, kei, thu hong gensak dih un; a piang peuhpeuh a piang hi mai hen
“Ka nuntakna pia ngamin, ka nuntakna ka ap ngam hi
Pasian in kei hong that mah taleh zong, phamawh ka sa kei hi. Ahi zongin ama mai-ah ka thu ka gen veve ding hi
Pasian' mai-ah migilote pai ngamlo uh ahih manin, ka han'na pen ka gualzawhna hi ding hi
Ka thugente limtak ngai un la, ka lahtelnate na za un
Ka thu a gen dingin a baihsa-in ka om a, thu ka zawh ding lamtak teltakin ka thei hi
“Pasian aw, keimah hong mawhsak ding na hi hiam? Nong mawhsak leh pau hetloin a si dingin ka kiging hi
Thu nih ka hong ngen hi, ka hong nget hong pia in. Tua ciangin nang tungah bangmah kong im kei ding hi
Kei tungah gim hong pia nawn kei in la, hih bang launa hong thuaksak nawn kei in
Pasian aw, hong hopih masa in, kong dawng ding hi. Kei, thu hong gensak in la, nangmah in hong dawng in
Ka mawhna ka khialhna bangzah pha ahi hiam? Ka mawh ka khialhna teng hong theisak in
“Bang hangin kei hong peel a, gal bangin hong ngaihsun na hi hiam
Bang hangin keimah lausak ding hanciam na hi hiam? Kei, singteh bang lel hilo ka hi hiam? Anvai themkhat galin do ding na hi hiam
“Nangmah in kei tungah thusiapi nong zong a, ka neulai huna ka gamtatna nangawn tawh nong mawhsak hi
Nangmah in ka khe sikkol nong bulh a, ka kalsuanna khempeuh leh ka khekhap nangawn na entel hi
Tua huhau-in singmuat bangin ka puk a, nget in a nek puan bangin ka zan-gawp hi.
